sources.name: Traffic
evidence: Nearest major road is 269 meters away.
sources.recommendation: Consider traffic management measures, reroute heavy vehicles, and enforce emission checks.

sources.name: Construction
evidence: Upwind sector (N) contains 0.15 sq km of construction/brownfield.
sources.recommendation: Review dust suppression compliance (water sprinkling, covers) at nearby construction sites.

sources.name: Regional Background
evidence: Base atmospheric pollution level representing broader urban/regional accumulation.
sources.recommendation: Coordinate with state/regional authorities on broad emission reduction policies.

sources.name: Industry
evidence: Upwind sector (N) contains 0.02 sq km of industrial land use.
sources.recommendation: Inspect nearby industrial sources for emission compliance and stack height regulations.

recommendations: Consider traffic management measures, reroute heavy vehicles, and enforce emission checks.
Review dust suppression compliance (water sprinkling, covers) at nearby construction sites.
Coordinate with state/regional authorities on broad emission reduction policies.
Inspect nearby industrial sources for emission compliance and stack height regulations.

english.general_public: The air quality is Very Poor. Main pollution source is Traffic. Respiratory illness on prolonged exposure.
english.sensitive_groups: Caution for sensitive groups: The air quality is Very Poor due to Traffic. Respiratory illness on prolonged exposure.

citizen_advisory.guidance_source: Based on CPCB National Air Quality Index standard health guidance categories
